reviews.comment:
Excelente! espacio para viajeros

(Translated by Google)
Excellent! Space for travelers
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNOdGJERXF3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Es un lindo espacio, tiene espacios con mesas afuera, con verde hermoso. Es la única estación que quedó cerca de la autopista. La atención es excelente. La comida no es buena.

(Translated by Google)
It's a nice place, with outdoor seating and beautiful greenery. It's the only station still close to the highway. The service is excellent. The food isn't good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNOM291cS1RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente!!!! Riquísimos platos del día para comer y seguir viajando.... excelentes las tortas y dulces caseros

(Translated by Google)
Excellent! Delicious daily specials to enjoy while you travel... the homemade cakes and sweets are excellent.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNOM3NMZGhBRRAB

reviews.comment:
La comida es excelente; muy superior a la de otros lugares para comer en estaciones de servicio: casera, buena relación de precio calidad y atención más personalizada.
Se destacan la torta de coco y dulce de leche, las empanadas de carne y la calidad del café

(Translated by Google)
The food is excellent, far superior to other gas station eateries: homemade, good value, and more personalized service.
The coconut and dulce de leche cake, the meat empanadas, and the quality of the coffee are particularly noteworthy.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNOenRLMFRBEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención

(Translated by Google)
Very good service
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNOMk1xa25BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Lindo lugar y buena atención, estacionamiento techado que es un plus cuando haces una parada a descansar o tomar algo y que cuando vuelvas el auto no sea un infierno.

(Translated by Google)
Nice place and good service, covered parking which is a plus when you stop to rest or have a drink and when you return the car is not a nightmare.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMxdnVhcGdnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Increíble 👏👏👏

Si no cargas combustible, tenés que pasar a comer algo, lo que sea. Delicioso 👏👏👏

Excelente atención, servicios y productos 👏👏👏

(Translated by Google)
Amazing! 👏👏👏

If you don't fill up with gas, you have to stop and grab something to eat, anything. Delicious! 👏👏👏

Excellent service, products, and attention! 👏👏👏
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMxbXIzUFFBEAE

reviews.comment:
La nafta igual que en otros lados. Pero el bar supercompleto

(Translated by Google)
Gasoline is the same as elsewhere. But the bar is super full.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMxdE1mUTZBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención y confortable lugar para una parada en el camino. Recomendable 😊👍

(Translated by Google)
Very good service and a comfortable place for a stop along the way. Recommended 😊👍

reviews.comment:
Limpio mesas afuera y adentro para comer algo cuando haces una parada en la ruta. Baños limpios

(Translated by Google)
I clean tables outside and inside for you to eat something when you stop along the way. Clean restrooms.
